video_title: The Satisfying Process of Candle Making | Inside a Modern Candle Factory

windows.old_description: Pouring wax into the candle moulds on the line.
windows.embed_text_v2: melting solid white wax blocks on heated furnace rails dripping molten wax, large steel vat of bubbling steaming golden-orange liquid wax, candle factory, close-up wax bubble rising
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, solid wax blocks melt and drip on heated rails, then molten golden wax steams and bubbles in a large heated vat.

seconds_v2.desc: Blocks of solid white wax sit on heated metal rails inside a glowing furnace, their bottom edges softening and dripping molten wax into a bright orange trough below.
The wax slabs continue melting on the hot rails, strands of liquid wax dripping down into the glowing channel.
Cut to a wide steel vat of melted golden-orange wax, steam rising from its surface as it heats between industrial pipes.
The vat of molten wax steams and gently ripples, lit warm orange.
Extreme close-up of the molten wax surface, glossy amber liquid with small bubbles forming.
The hot liquid wax swirls; a domed bubble begins to rise at the center of the surface.
A large clear bubble swells up through the molten golden wax surface.
The bubble grows taller, surrounded by tiny droplets on the glossy amber wax.
The tall wax bubble reaches its peak at the center of the simmering molten wax pool before it will burst.

seconds.vision_desc: a black bowl with a liquid pouring out of it
a metal pot filled with liquid
a close up of a liquid being poured into a metal container
a close up of a metal container filled with liquid
a close up of a metal container filled with liquid
a close up of a metal container filled with liquid
a black background with a white and red flower
a tunnel with a light coming from the end

windows.embed_text: a black bowl with a liquid pouring out of it | a metal pot filled with liquid | a close up of a liquid being poured into a metal container | a close up of a metal container filled with liquid | a black background with a white and red flower | a tunnel with a light coming from the end
windows.old_description: Molten wax vat swirling in the factory.
windows.embed_text_v2: Machine pouring molten golden wax from a metal nozzle into round steel candle moulds, centering an upright wick, filled metal containers riding a conveyor through a blue cooling tunnel, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, molten golden wax is poured by machine into round metal moulds and wicks are centered, with finished filled containers then conveyed down a cooling tunnel.

tags_v2.action: pouring molten wax and setting wick on factory line
tags_v2.setting: industrial candle factory, dim lighting and conveyor tunnel

seconds_v2.desc: Dim, dramatically lit factory close-up: a metal dispensing nozzle pours a thin stream of molten golden-amber wax down into a round metal container below, the scene mostly in shadow.
Brighter view of the same automated filler nozzle releasing a steady ribbon of creamy golden wax into a steel mould already partly filled with liquid wax; out-of-focus containers line up behind.
Continued pour of molten wax from the metal nozzle into the round steel container, the surface of the pooled wax swirling as the stream hits it.
The wax stream thins as the nozzle finishes dispensing into the filled metal mould, ripples spreading across the glossy amber surface.
Pour has stopped; a single pale wick is now standing upright, centered in the middle of the freshly filled metal container of golden wax, being held/pulled taut from above.
Close-up of the centered white wick rising from the smooth molten wax surface in the steel mould, the wick being positioned vertically in the just-poured candle.
Same framing: the upright wick stands centered in the round metal container of liquid golden wax, with another filled mould blurred behind it on the line.
Full black frame, a cut/transition between the pouring close-up and the next wide shot.

Wide shot looking down a long blue-lit cylindrical tunnel: round metal candle containers ride a conveyor track receding into the distance, their centered wicks visible, moving through what appears to be a cooling/setting tunnel.

a bowl of liquid

windows.embed_text: a mixer with a liquid inside of it | a bowl of liquid | a blue liquid | a green liquid | a factory line with white candles on it
windows.old_description: Molten wax vat swirling in the factory.
windows.embed_text_v2: Industrial candle factory mixing stainless vat agitator stirring amber molten wax, red blue green colorant dye poured into wax pools, finished white pillar candles travelling on factory conveyor belt.
windows.summary_v2: Industrial candle factory montage: agitator stirring amber wax, then red, blue, and green dyes poured in turn into wax pools, ending on a conveyor of finished white pillar candles.

tags_v2.action: mix wax and add dye industrial

seconds_v2.desc: Large stainless steel industrial mixing vat with a paddle-style agitator spinning amber/orange molten wax, swirling vortex visible in the kettle.
Close-up: bright red dye/colorant pours in a thick stream onto a pool of amber molten wax, splashing into a red puddle on the surface.
Continued pour of red colorant into the amber wax, spreading into a larger red disc on top of the orange wax.
Cut to blue colorant pouring as a thick stream into a similar orange wax pool, forming a vivid blue disc on the surface.
Cut to bright green colorant pouring as a thick rope onto an amber wax pool, blooming into a green disc with concentric ripples.
Green colorant pour continues; stream slimmer, splash crown rising from the pool.
Green colorant pour stops; ripples spread outward across the green-tinted glossy wax surface in the warm-lit kettle.
Cut to wide shot of factory conveyor line: long row of plain white pillar candles with wicks moving along a metal conveyor, blue-uniformed worker out-of-focus in background.
Same conveyor line, camera pulled slightly back; white pillar candles continue down line, factory lighting cool blue.

windows.old_description: Rows of candles in the warehouse/cooling.
windows.embed_text_v2: automated nozzles pouring molten orange wax into cylindrical pillar candle moulds on factory conveyor, rows of cream pillar candles cooling and curing in long lit tunnel, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: Automated nozzles pour molten wax into pillar candle moulds on a factory line, then the filled candles travel through a long tunnel to cool and cure.

tags_v2.action: pouring wax into moulds then cooling

seconds_v2.desc: On a factory line, automated nozzles pour streams of molten orange wax into a row of cylindrical pillar candle moulds already filled with amber wax.
The filling heads dispense wax down into the line of pillar moulds as the conveyor advances.
Close view of a nozzle pouring a glossy stream of molten wax into a half-filled pillar mould.
A bank of dispensing nozzles tops off many wicked pillar candles with molten wax on the line.
Multiple nozzles simultaneously pour thin streams of liquid wax into the centered-wick pillar moulds.
Cut to a long tunnel where rows of poured cream-colored pillar candles sit in trays on a conveyor under warm light, beginning to cool.
The filled pillar candles travel in formation down the cooling/curing tunnel.
The lighting shifts cool blue as the rows of solidifying pillar candles recede down the tunnel.
Endless rows of cooling cream pillar candles stretch into the distance of the blue-lit curing tunnel.

windows.old_description: Pouring wax into moulds on the line.
windows.embed_text_v2: Industrial factory robotic arm placing white pillar candles on conveyor and wick-dipping machine with dense rows of upright cotton wicks in conveyor jig, finishing with moody smoke-lit reveal of finished pillar candles.
windows.summary_v2: Industrial candle factory sequence: robotic arms above a conveyor of pillar candles, a wick-dipping machine with dense rows of wicks, ending on a moody smoke-lit reveal of finished pillar candles.

seconds_v2.desc: Factory pillar-candle line: a robotic arm with three nozzle modules hovers above a conveyor belt carrying white cylindrical pillar candles; finished candles visible in foreground.
Solid black transition frame.
Close-up of an industrial wick-dipping or wick-assembly machine: dense rows of upright white wicks/strands held in a grid jig on a conveyor below hanging metal nozzles.
Same wick-assembly machine; nozzles above, rows of vertical white wicks rising from the conveyor jig.
Same shot, slight camera pan; rows of wicks marching along the conveyor under the nozzles.
Continued view of wick-tray on conveyor passing under the dipping nozzles.
Same wick-dipping machine, slight camera move; long line of wicks extends out of frame.
Mostly black frame with a faint reddish-orange glow in the centre, suggesting a fade or smoke transition.
Three large pale finished pillar candles sit on a surface enveloped in atmospheric white smoke, warm orange lighting; mood reveal of finished product.

windows.embed_text_v2: cream pillar candles cooling in white mist, then pouring bright red and blue liquid dye colorant into shallow vat of pale molten wax forming swirling colored rings, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: Finished pillar candles cool in mist, then close-ups show red and blue liquid dye being poured and swirled into pale molten wax to color it.

tags_v2.action: adding liquid dye to molten wax

seconds_v2.desc: Several cream pillar candles stand surrounded by thick swirling white mist/fog inside a warm-lit cooling chamber.
The finished pillar candles sit shrouded in drifting vapor as they cool.
Mist continues to curl around the group of cream pillar candles.
The candles remain enveloped in fog under the warm orange light.
Last misty view of the cooling cream pillar candles before the scene cuts.
Extreme close-up: a thick stream of bright red liquid dye pours down into a shallow vat of pale cream wax, forming a red bullseye on the surface.
The red dye stream widens, swirling concentric rings of red into the pale molten wax.
More red colorant pours in, the vat surface now mostly vivid red with spiral ripples.
The stream changes to bright blue dye pouring into the pale wax, swirling blue rings across the surface.

windows.embed_text: a blue liquid is being poured into a white bowl | a blue liquid is being poured into a bowl | a green liquid is being poured into a bowl | a red bowl with a white candle inside | a red bowl with a white handle | a red object in a blue bowl | a blue paint bucket | a candle is lit in the middle of a green bowl
windows.embed_text_v2: pouring thick liquid dye streams blue green red yellow into shallow vats of colored molten wax, swirling concentric colored rings, candle wax coloring close-up, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: A montage of thick liquid dye streams in blue, green, red and yellow pouring and swirling into vats of colored wax, illustrating candle wax coloring.

tags_v2.action: pouring liquid dye into colored wax

seconds_v2.desc: Extreme close-up of a thick blue liquid dye stream pouring into a shallow vat of pale wax, swirling a blue ring across the surface.
The blue dye keeps pouring, spreading wider concentric blue rings over the cream wax.
The pouring stream turns vivid green, swirling bright green into the pale wax pool.
A thick pale cream stream pours down into a vat now filled with glossy red liquid.
The descending stream takes on red color as it plunges into the red wax/dye pool.
A solid red column of liquid pours down, the vat below shifting from red toward blue at the edges.
A bright blue stream pours into a blue pool, with a green pool visible at the right edge.
The pouring column shows blue blending into the vivid green vat surface as it splashes.
A green-tinted stream pours into a yellow wax pool, dye splashing off the rim of the colored vat.

windows.embed_text: a green candle | a black background with a white and red light | a candle with a candle in the middle | a black background with a white border
windows.old_description: Pouring wax into moulds on the line.
windows.embed_text_v2: Decorating finishing candles, pouring green dye into yellow molten wax, peeling carved filigree scroll shavings from burgundy pillar candle with sculpting tool, hands arranging dried lavender stems and rose petals atop cream beeswax pillar candle.
windows.summary_v2: Montage of decorative candle finishing steps: green dye pouring into yellow wax, hand-carved filigree on a burgundy pillar candle being peeled with a sculpting tool, then dried lavender and rose petals being arranged on top of a cream pillar candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up: a thick column of vivid green molten wax pours downward into a bright yellow pool of molten wax in a large container; a separate small green wax pool splashes on the left.
Solid black transition frame with a tiny red spark in the middle.

Close shot of an ornate carved dark-pink/burgundy pillar candle; a fine pointed sculpting tool/burin enters frame from below as a curled wax shaving is being lifted off the decorative scrollwork on the top rim.
Sculpting tool lifts a curl of pink wax shaving from the decorative scroll pattern at the top edge of the carved candle.
Wax shaving curl now larger, lifted by tool; ornate filigree-like scroll carving clearly visible around the candle's top edge.
More wax curls being peeled from the carved candle's rim; a small spiral of pink wax dangles above the candle.
Decorative wax curl now wider and more ornate; sculpting tool tip still in centre, dark-pink filigree band fully in focus.
Solid black transition frame.
Hands enter frame above a cream/pale beeswax pillar candle and arrange dried lavender stems with pink rose petals scattered on its flat top as a final decoration.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring molten amber wax overflowing into rows of metal candle tins on conveyor, close-up white jar candle wax cooling setting with radial crystallization around centered wick, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: Molten wax pours to overfill rows of metal candle tins, then a close-up shows a wicked jar candle's wax surface cooling into a radial pattern and setting.

tags_v2.action: pouring wax into tins and setting

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead spouts pour thick streams of molten amber wax that overflow and coat dozens of metal candle tins packed on a conveyor.
The wax keeps cascading into and over the rows of metal tins, filling them to the brim on the line.
Cut to a close-up of a single white candle jar filled with glossy yellow molten wax, a centered wick at its surface.
The wax surface in the white jar begins to cool, faint radial crystallization streaks fanning out from the wick.
The radial frosting pattern across the cooling yellow wax becomes more defined around the wick.
The wax continues setting, the starburst pattern softening as the surface lightens.
The wax in the jar has cooled paler and smoother, fine ridges remaining near the rim.
The candle surface is now nearly uniform pale cream as the wax finishes solidifying around the upright wick.
Cut to a dim, dark shot of overhead filling machine nozzles silhouetted above a white container on the line.

windows.embed_text_v2: machine twisting braiding cotton candle wick cords into coiled rope, then metal racks of finished cream and pink pillar candles with wicks curing in warm-lit storage, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: Machinery braids cotton candle wicking, then the scene shows shelving racks of finished cream and pink pillar candles curing in storage.

tags_v2.action: making wick then curing pillar candles

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of machinery feeding several twisted cream cotton wick cords downward, where they coil and braid into a thick rope of candle wicking.
The strands of cotton wick continue twisting and piling into a coiled braid on the moving surface below.
The frame goes fully black during a scene transition.
Cut to a metal storage rack holding rows of cream and pink pillar candles with upright wicks, dimly warm-lit as they cure.
Steady view of the shelf of finished pillar candles resting in their trays.
The rack of cooling pillar candles is shown, warm light glowing behind them.
Rows of cream pillar candles with one dusty-pink candle sit curing on the metal shelf.
Continued view of the stacked shelves of finished pillar candles in storage.
Final steady shot of the racked rows of cream and pink pillar candles curing.

windows.embed_text_v2: dispensing nozzle dripping pale yellow fragrance oil into wax vat, large rotating stainless mixing drum swirling pale wax with red blue green colored wax chunks into marble spiral, candle factory
windows.summary_v2: A spout drips fragrance/wax into a vat, then a large rotating drum mixes pale wax with red, blue and green colored wax chunks into a swirling marble.

tags_v2.action: adding fragrance and mixing colored wax

seconds_v2.desc: A machine spout drips droplets of pale yellow liquid (fragrance oil/wax) into a round white vat, raising small concentric ripples on the surface.
A thin steady stream now pours from the nozzle into the pale wax pool, spreading rings outward.
A single droplet hangs from the spout above the rippling pale yellow liquid.
The nozzle continues dripping into the vat, ripples radiating from the impact point.
Another droplet forms and falls from the dispenser into the pale wax surface.
Cut to a large stainless mixing drum holding a swirling pool of pale yellow wax studded with chunks of red, blue and green colored wax, churning into a spiral.
The drum rotates, dragging the colored wax chunks into a tighter rainbow spiral through the pale wax.
The swirl continues, streaks of blue, red and green marbling across the rotating yellow wax.
The colored chunks blend further into green and blue swirls as the mixing drum keeps turning the wax.

windows.embed_text_v2: display finished pillar candles glowing in rows on wooden pallets across a dim blue factory floor, then aerial night exterior of the lit industrial candle factory building
windows.summary_v2: A reveal of a blue-lit factory floor full of finished glowing candles cuts to an aerial night exterior establishing shot of the candle factory.

tags_v2.action: reveal finished candles and factory exterior
tags_v2.setting: candle factory interior and aerial night exterior

seconds_v2.desc: Wide interior shot of a dim, blue-lit candle factory floor; rows of lit finished pillar candles sit on wooden pallets flanking a central aisle, with manufacturing machinery along the walls.
Same static wide view of the factory hall with glowing finished candles arranged in rows on pallets; no making activity, purely a display/reveal of finished product.
Cut to an aerial night exterior of the industrial facility; the factory compound is mostly dark with scattered amber perimeter and dock lights outlining the buildings.
Aerial night drone view descending slightly over the lit warehouse complex, exterior dock doors glowing amber around a dark central roof.
Continued aerial night shot of the factory grounds; rows of lit loading-bay doors and a tower structure visible, surrounding lots dark.
Aerial night exterior, camera drifting; the warehouse rooftop and illuminated dock doors fill the frame against a black sky.
Final aerial night view of the industrial site, buildings outlined by amber lights, establishing the factory location at night.
